message:
test(accelerate): add metamorphic tests for softmax, normalization, and attention scoring

Introduce 475-line metamorphic test suite validating numerical invariants
of the accelerate module's core math operations:

- Softmax sum-to-one: output probability vectors must sum to 1.0 within
  epsilon for arbitrary finite inputs
- Softmax shift invariance: softmax(x + c) == softmax(x) for any
  constant c, ensuring numerical stability under input translation
- Softmax monotonicity: larger inputs must produce larger output
  probabilities (order preservation)
- Normalize sum-to-one: L1 normalization output must sum to 1.0
- Attention symmetry: scoring invariants under query/key permutations

Each metamorphic relation is scored by fault sensitivity, independence,
and computational cost in a strength matrix documented in the module
header. Tests use local CPU reimplementations to avoid hardware
dependencies while validating the same mathematical contracts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
